text:
team.2 In 2020, CMS contracted an expert panel to validate the algorithms following the change from 
International Classification of Diseases (ICD)-9 to ICD-10-CM. CMS also asked the expert panel to refine these 
algorithms and identify additional conditions to add to the CCW, resulting in the 30 CCW Chronic Conditions 
algorithms. The CCW contains two versions of the Chronic Conditions algorithms: the 30 CCW Chronic Conditions 
(2017 forward) and the 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (1999–20203).
